basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute has released the official Project Associate I Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026 at CSIR NEERI Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with M.Sc. in Chemistry or Environmental Science from a recognized University and a maximum age limit of 35 years can attend the walk-in interview on 08 June 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry or Environmental Science from recognized University
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry or Environmental Science from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000 + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 June 2026. Candidates should reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Chemistry or Environmental Science from a recognized University to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute, Kolkata, West Bengal, 700107.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I post will be based on a Walk-in Interview.
